title: ononis reclinata var. linnaei
intro: Ononis reclinata var. linnaei, also known as the Spreading Restharrow, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, characterized by its sprawling habit and pink to purple flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ononis reclinata var. linnaei include its potential to alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, fever, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or dried extracts, and is said to be effective in treating a range of conditions, including urinary tract infections and menstrual cramps.
